title: Ebb
content:
I know what my heart is like
                 Since your love died:
             It is like a hollow ledge
             Holding a little pool
                 Left there by the tide,
                 A little tepid pool,
             Drying inward from the edge.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edna St. Vincent Millay, titled "Ebb", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
